caption:
From the Strait of Hormuz to Dubai’s glittering skyline, this is a story of grit in the shadow of gathering storm clouds.

I meet @rizwan.sajan — billionaire entrepreneur, Chairman of the Danube Group — a man whose journey begins in the slums of Ghatkopar in Mumbai and rises to the commanding heights of Dubai’s business world. In this candid conversation, he reflects on fleeing Kuwait during the first Gulf War, the instinct to stay put when others panic, and why, even now, he believes there is simply no place like Dubai.

All of this unfolds against a chilling backdrop: Iran’s warning that it could seize the UAE’s coastline if Washington “makes a mistake.” A region on edge, where the UAE has already found itself caught in the crossfire of retaliation.

And yet here in Dubai — amid the anxiety, the speculation, the noise — there is also defiance, ambition, and an unwavering belief in tomorrow. 

Watch our full coverage on our youtube channel @themojostory
